title: Aakasha Mittayee
overview: A father-son movie that travels through the life of three families, especially about a father who nurtures and raises his son as a good human being in the society. The movie also deals with which present-day issues of the school students in the society and other teenager problems. It is a very soothing family entertainer that tries to convey many beautiful messages.
